title: Skaar's 3D Totems
description: Add your own Minecraft skin as a 3D totem with ease.
body:
![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/36afb078b7e68ac0889ef6d2baaf8bc7b72c3597.png) #
3D Totems adds an easy way for you to make a 3D player skin totem of undying.

**
The newest version should work in every version, until and including at least 1.16.x
** #
# **
How to install and use the pack:
**
# **
How to install and use the pack (text):
**
Spoiler First unzip the resource pack folder. Open the unzipped folder. Then open the "assets" folder. When inside the assets folder, go minecraft > textures > item. Once you open the item folder, replace the image file inside of it with the image file of your skin, and rename it to be "totem_of_undying".


#
If you like 3D totems, please share it with a friend that might also enjoy it. <3

Prefer Curseforge? Check it out [here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/skaars-3d-totems)
# **
DO NOT REDISTRIBUTE
**
